title: False blocker pattern: blocked_by refs not verified at lug creation
signal: False blocker pattern: impl lugs listed impl-lathe-spoke-scoring-v1 as blocked_by, but Lathe was already built (lathe_score.py existed, spoke_lathe.json populated). Blocked_by references are not verified at lug creation. Before treating a blocker as a gate, verify the blocking lug actually exists and is unresolved.
rationale: Would have blocked Phase 2 compass/gardener work indefinitely if not caught during wakeup analysis.
decision_reason: Category: track-lug. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
